---
title: "Annualized Data Plotting"
author: "Jiacheng Min"
date: "`r Sys.Date()`"
output: pdf_document
---

# Load packages
```{r, warning = FALSE, output = FALSE}
packages <- c("readxl", "ggplot2", "forecast", "dplyr", "gridExtra", "writexl", 
              "tseries", "hwwntest", "dlnm", "splines", "ISOweek", "mgcv", 
              "Metrics", "demography", "seastests", "MTS", "reshape2", "astsa",
              "MASS", "patchwork")
lapply(packages, library, character.only = TRUE)
```

# Load DLNM-LL Results
```{r}
load("/Users/jiachengabelmin/Desktop/LC_DLNM/Results/Simulated_annualized_mortality_rates/final_LL.sim.annualized.rcp26.RData")
load("/Users/jiachengabelmin/Desktop/LC_DLNM/Results/Simulated_annualized_mortality_rates/final_LL.sim.annualized.rcp85.RData")
```

# DLNM-LL Results under Different Scenarios (Functions)
```{r}
# Function to prepare data for plotting (with filtering by start_index)
prepare_plot_data <- function(sim_data, region, age_group, start_year, start_index) {
  # Extract data for the specified region and age group
  region_data <- sim_data[[region]]
  age_group_data <- lapply(region_data, function(sim) sim[[age_group]])
  
  # Combine all simulations into a matrix
  sim_matrix <- do.call(rbind, age_group_data)
  sim_matrix <- sim_matrix[, start_index:ncol(sim_matrix)]  # Filter data from start_index onward
  
  # Calculate mean and confidence intervals
  summary_df <- data.frame(
    time = seq(start_year, start_year + ncol(sim_matrix) - 1),  # Generate yearly time points
    mean = colMeans(sim_matrix),
    lower = apply(sim_matrix, 2, quantile, probs = 0.025),
    upper = apply(sim_matrix, 2, quantile, probs = 0.975)
  )
  return(summary_df)
}

# List of datasets_final_LL and labels
datasets_final_LL <- list(
  "RCP 2.6" = final_LL.sim.annualized.rcp26,
  "RCP 8.5" = final_LL.sim.annualized.rcp85
)
```

## Attiki Results
```{r}
# parameters
target_region <- "Attiki"
age_groups     <- c(
  Y20_64 = "20-64",
  Y65_74 = "65-74",
  Y75_84 = "75-84",
  Y_GE85 = "85+"
)
start_year  <- 2031
start_index <- 11  # annualized index for 2030

plots <- lapply(names(age_groups), function(age_group) {
  df <- lapply(names(datasets_final_LL), function(scenario) {
    summary_df <- prepare_plot_data(
      datasets_final_LL[[scenario]],
      target_region,
      age_group,
      start_year,
      start_index
    )
    summary_df$mean    <- exp(summary_df$mean)
    summary_df$lower   <- exp(summary_df$lower)
    summary_df$upper   <- exp(summary_df$upper)
    summary_df$Scenario <- scenario
    summary_df
  }) %>% bind_rows()
  
  ggplot(df, aes(x = time, color = Scenario)) +
    geom_line(aes(y = lower),  linetype = "dashed", size = 0.3) +
    geom_line(aes(y = upper),  linetype = "dashed", size = 0.3) +
    geom_line(aes(y = mean),   size = 0.6) +
    scale_color_manual(
      name   = "Scenario",
      values = c(
        "RCP 2.6" = "#007bbd",
        "RCP 8.5" = "#B7282E"
      )
    ) +
    labs(
      subtitle = paste("Age group", age_groups[[age_group]]),
      x        = "Year",
      y        = "Mortality Rate"
    ) +
    theme_minimal() +
    theme(
      panel.border       = element_rect(color = "black", fill = NA),
      panel.grid.major.x = element_blank(),
      panel.grid.major.y = element_line(color = "gray80"),
      plot.subtitle      = element_text(size = 14, face = "bold", hjust = 0.5),
      axis.title         = element_text(size = 12),
      axis.text          = element_text(size = 10),
      legend.position    = "bottom",
      legend.text        = element_text(size = 10),
      legend.title       = element_text(size = 11)
    ) +
    scale_x_continuous(
      breaks = c(2031, 2036, 2041, 2046),
      limits = c(start_year, 2046),
      expand = c(0, 0)
    ) +
    scale_y_continuous(
      expand = expansion(mult = c(0.4, 0.4))
    )
})

final_plot <- wrap_plots(plots, ncol = 2) +
  plot_layout(guides = "collect") &
  theme(legend.position = "bottom")

print(final_plot)

# Save the final plot
ggsave(filename = "/Users/jiachengabelmin/Desktop/LC_DLNM/Figures/RCP_Simulation/Overall_annualized/B_DLNM_LL/Attiki_annualized_sim.pdf",
      plot = final_plot, width = 10, height = 6, units = "in", dpi = 1000)
```

## Lisbon Results
```{r}
# Define target region and age groups
target_region <- "Lisbon"
age_groups <- c("Y20_64" = "20-64", "Y65_74" = "65-74", "Y75_84" = "75-84", "Y_GE85" = "85+")

# Set the start year (2030) and starting index (11 for annualized data)
start_year <- 2031 
start_index <- 11  # Index corresponding to 2030 for annualized data

# Prepare plots for each age group
plots <- lapply(names(age_groups), function(age_group) {
  df <- lapply(names(datasets_final_LL), function(scenario) {
    summary_df <- prepare_plot_data(
      datasets_final_LL[[scenario]],
      target_region,
      age_group,
      start_year,
      start_index
    )
    summary_df$mean  <- exp(summary_df$mean)
    summary_df$lower <- exp(summary_df$lower)
    summary_df$upper <- exp(summary_df$upper)
    summary_df$Scenario <- scenario
    summary_df
  }) %>% bind_rows()
  
  ggplot(df, aes(x = time, color = Scenario)) +
    geom_line(aes(y = lower),  linetype = "dashed", size = 0.3) +
    geom_line(aes(y = upper),  linetype = "dashed", size = 0.3) +
    geom_line(aes(y = mean),   size = 0.4) +
    scale_color_manual(
      name   = "Scenario",
      values = c("RCP 2.6" = "#007bbd", "RCP 8.5" = "#B7282E")
    ) +
    labs(
      subtitle = paste("Age group", age_groups[[age_group]]),
      x        = "Year",
      y        = "Mortality Rate"
    ) +
    theme_minimal() +
    theme(
      panel.border       = element_rect(color = "black", fill = NA),
      panel.grid.major.x = element_blank(),
      panel.grid.major.y = element_line(color = "gray80"),
      plot.subtitle      = element_text(size = 14, face = "bold", hjust = 0.5),
      axis.title         = element_text(size = 12),
      axis.text          = element_text(size = 10),
      legend.position    = "bottom",
      legend.text        = element_text(size = 10),
      legend.title       = element_text(size = 11)
    ) +
    scale_x_continuous(
      breaks = c(2031, 2036, 2041, 2046),
      limits = c(start_year, 2046),
      expand = c(0, 0)
    ) +
    scale_y_continuous(
      expand = expansion(mult = c(0.4, 0.4))
    )
})

# arrange into 2 rows × 2 columns with a shared legend at the bottom
final_plot <- wrap_plots(plots, ncol = 2) +
  plot_layout(guides = "collect") &
  theme(legend.position = "bottom")

print(final_plot)

# Save the final plot
ggsave(filename = "/Users/jiachengabelmin/Desktop/LC_DLNM/Figures/RCP_Simulation/Overall_annualized/B_DLNM_LL/Lisbon_annualized_sim.pdf",
      plot = final_plot, width = 10, height = 6, units = "in", dpi = 1000)
```

## Roma Results
```{r}
# Define target region and age groups
target_region <- "Roma"
age_groups <- c("Y20_64" = "20-64", "Y65_74" = "65-74", "Y75_84" = "75-84", "Y_GE85" = "85+")

# Set the start year (2030) and starting index (11 for annualized data)
start_year <- 2031 
start_index <- 11  # Index corresponding to 2030 for annualized data

# Prepare plots for each age group
plots <- lapply(names(age_groups), function(age_group) {
  df <- lapply(names(datasets_final_LL), function(scenario) {
    summary_df <- prepare_plot_data(
      datasets_final_LL[[scenario]],
      target_region,
      age_group,
      start_year,
      start_index
    )
    summary_df$mean  <- exp(summary_df$mean)
    summary_df$lower <- exp(summary_df$lower)
    summary_df$upper <- exp(summary_df$upper)
    summary_df$Scenario <- scenario
    summary_df
  }) %>% bind_rows()
  
  ggplot(df, aes(x = time, color = Scenario)) +
    geom_line(aes(y = lower),  linetype = "dashed", size = 0.3) +
    geom_line(aes(y = upper),  linetype = "dashed", size = 0.3) +
    geom_line(aes(y = mean),   size = 0.4) +
    scale_color_manual(
      name   = "Scenario",
      values = c("RCP 2.6" = "#007bbd", "RCP 8.5" = "#B7282E")
    ) +
    labs(
      subtitle = paste("Age group", age_groups[[age_group]]),
      x        = "Year",
      y        = "Mortality Rate"
    ) +
    theme_minimal() +
    theme(
      panel.border       = element_rect(color = "black", fill = NA),
      panel.grid.major.x = element_blank(),
      panel.grid.major.y = element_line(color = "gray80"),
      plot.subtitle      = element_text(size = 14, face = "bold", hjust = 0.5),
      axis.title         = element_text(size = 12),
      axis.text          = element_text(size = 10),
      legend.position    = "bottom",
      legend.text        = element_text(size = 10),
      legend.title       = element_text(size = 11)
    ) +
    scale_x_continuous(
      breaks = c(2031, 2036, 2041, 2046),
      limits = c(start_year, 2046),
      expand = c(0, 0)
    ) + 
    scale_y_continuous(
      expand = expansion(mult = c(0.4, 0.4))
    )
})

# arrange into 2 rows × 2 columns with a shared legend at the bottom
final_plot <- wrap_plots(plots, ncol = 2) +
  plot_layout(guides = "collect") &
  theme(legend.position = "bottom")

print(final_plot)

# Save the final plot
ggsave(filename = "/Users/jiachengabelmin/Desktop/LC_DLNM/Figures/RCP_Simulation/Overall_annualized/B_DLNM_LL/Roma_annualized_sim.pdf",
      plot = final_plot, width = 10, height = 6, units = "in", dpi = 1000)
```
